tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text: Everybody dreams, even people 1.1. _________ believe they never do. Dreams happen 1.2. _________ we are in a deep stage of sleep, usually several times a night. Scientists are still not completely sure 1.3. _________ we dream at all. Some believe that dreaming helps the brain 1.4. _________ sort through the memories of the day. 1.5. _________ theory suggests that dreams allow us to practise dealing with difficult situations. Most dreams 1.6. _________ forgotten within minutes of waking up. 1.7. _________ you want to remember them, it helps to write them down immediately. Children tend to dream 1.8. _________ often than adults. Although a dream can feel 1.9. _________ though it lasts for hours, it may in fact last only a few seconds. There is still 1.10. _________ great deal that we do not understand about the sleeping mind.
